General.Name: Groupe Carnivor SA
General.Description: Groupe Carnivor Société Anonyme processes, packages, and distributes meat products in France. The company offers beef, calf, lamb, pork, poultry, sausage, and offal; and fresh produce, including dairy, cold cuts, fresh pasta, and prepared meals. It also provides deli meats, cheeses, grocery items, condiments, fruits, and vegetables. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Toulon, France.
General.Address: Maison de la Boucherie, Toulon, France, 83200
